edits.find: We enrich and structure this data to provide regulatory intelligence. See §5.4.
edits.replace: We enrich and structure this data to provide regulatory intelligence. See §5.4. The Article 14 UK GDPR transparency notice for all personal data in this public-record estate — including enforcement records published by the Health and Safety Executive — is our Tribunal Data Privacy Notice; records concerning individual (non-corporate) enforcement subjects are quarantined from all client-facing and commercial surfaces.

No personal profiles created. HSE enforcement data programme (public-register records) Legitimate interests Art. 6(1)(f) Criminal-offence data within these records is processed under DPA 2018 s.10(5) and Schedule 1 Part 2 paragraph 10 (paragraph 11 in the alternative), supported by our Appropriate Policy Document. Records of individual enforcement subjects are excluded from commercial processing: classification, suppression and deletion only.

edits.find: The current version of this Policy, together with its version date, is always available at ailane.ai/privacy/.
edits.replace:
The current version of this Policy, together with its version date, is always available at ailane.ai/privacy/.

v4.3 adds the lawful-basis row and Tribunal Data Privacy Notice signpost for the HSE enforcement data programme (AMD-177–180; AMD-182).
